patch.value: CONTEXT: agents gate automation on pm health --json .ok; telemetry queue/endpoint issues used to flip ok:false and block pipelines. DECISION: any warning code prefixed telemetry_ is advisory via isAdvisoryHealthWarning() — surfaced in warnings but excluded from the blocking set that drives ok; permanent policy. CONSEQUENCES: ok:true reliably means the tracker is functional; telemetry outages never cascade to blocked CI; a permanently-down endpoint needs explicit --check-telemetry monitoring (high-water-mark advisory). EVIDENCE: src/cli/commands/health.ts isAdvisoryHealthWarning/blockingWarnings; items pm-gmnh/pm-1lgy.
ADR: Health checks are advisory vs blocking: telemetry_* never flips ok:false
Health checks are advisory vs blocking: telemetry_* never flips ok:false
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Health checks are advisory vs blocking: telemetry_* never flips ok:false' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
